name: ADC 2 MW CDU (Project Deschutes aligned)
telemetry_domain: D3 (Tier 2, Modbus→Redfish bridge; PLC = safety authority)

parameters.value: 2x SPECK TOEMA065200 sealless, N+1, 500 GPM @ 112 psi, 37 kW each, ABB ACH580 VFD per pump
3x Alfa Laval CB210-276AH two-pass plate HX in parallel
1x Belimo B6500 + actuator, facility side, holds 3 °C approach
65.25 W x 91.44 H x 42.29 D (packaged height max 100)
rack-loop / leak-response logic stays in the CDU PLC (CompactLogix 5380) — never an external gateway or AI layer
